tools.name: experience_availability
tools.description: Get availability information for a specific experience including dates, times, and pricing

tools.name: experience_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific experience by ID

tools.name: render_activity_tiles
tools.description: Render activity tiles for a list of activity IDs, returning an embeddable widget URI

tools.name: search_experiences
tools.description: Search for travel experiences with comprehensive filtering options. Returns available categories, tags, and regions with IDs for further filtering.
